---
title: "Our Team - The Jo Lab"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    anchor-sections: false
---


<div class="page-header"><h1 class="page-header__title">Our Team</h1></div>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r,echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=T, results='asis'}
cat('<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/lipis/flag-icons@7.2.3/css/flag-icons.min.css"/>')

library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)

pi <- read_xlsx("data/team.xlsx") %>%
  filter(position == "pi")

cat('<div class="page-header"><h1 class="page-header__title">Principal Investigator</h1></div>')

cat(str_glue('
<div class="member-card fade-in">
<div>
<img src="{pi$photo}" alt="Profile Photo" class="member-card__photo">
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="member-card__name">{pi$name} <span class="fi fi-br"></span><span class="fi fi-kr"></span></h3>
<div class="member-card__links">
{if (!is.na(pi$contact)) paste0(\'<a href="mailto:\', pi$contact, \'"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></a>\') else ""}
{if (!is.na(pi$linkedin)) paste0(\'<a href="https://\', pi$linkedin, \'"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>\') else ""}
{if (!is.na(pi$bluesky)) paste0(\'<a href="https://\', pi$bluesky, \'"><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i></a>\') else ""}
</div>
<p class="member-card__role">{pi$subheading}</p>
<p class="member-card__bio">{pi$description}</p>
</div>
</div>
'))

```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r,echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=T, results='asis'}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)

current <- read_xlsx("data/team.xlsx") %>%
  filter(status == "current") %>%
  filter(!position == "pi")

if (nrow(current) > 0) {

cat('<div class="page-header"><h1 class="page-header__title">Current members</h1></div>')

for (k in 1:nrow(current)) {

current.member <- current[k,]
cat(str_glue('
<div class="member-card fade-in">
<div>
<img src="{current.member$photo}" alt="Profile Photo" class="member-card__photo">
</div>
<div>
<h3 class="member-card__name">{current.member$name} <span class="fi fi-{current.member$nation}"></span></h3>
<div class="member-card__links">
{if (!is.na(current.member$contact)) paste0(\'<a href="mailto:\', current.member$contact, \'"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></a>\') else ""}
{if (!is.na(current.member$linkedin)) paste0(\'<a href="https://\', current.member$linkedin, \'"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>\') else ""}
{if (!is.na(current.member$bluesky)) paste0(\'<a href="https://\', current.member$bluesky, \'"><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i></a>\') else ""}
</div>
<p class="member-card__role">{current.member$subheading}</p>
<p class="member-card__bio">{current.member$description}</p>
</div>
</div>
'))


}
} else {invisible(NULL)}
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)

alumni <- read_xlsx("data/team.xlsx") %>%
  filter(status == "alumni") %>%
  filter(!position == "pi") %>%
  arrange(position)

if (nrow(alumni) > 0) {
  cat('<div class="page-header"><h1 class="page-header__title">Alumni members</h1></div>')
  cat('<div class="alumni-grid fade-in-stagger">')

  for (k in 1:nrow(alumni)) {
    alumni.member <- alumni[k,]

    icons <- paste0(
      if (!is.na(alumni.member$contact)) paste0('<a href="mailto:', alumni.member$contact, '"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i></a>') else "",
      if (!is.na(alumni.member$linkedin)) paste0('<a href="https://', alumni.member$linkedin, '"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i></a>') else "",
      if (!is.na(alumni.member$bluesky)) paste0('<a href="https://', alumni.member$bluesky, '"><i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i></a>') else ""
    )

    cat(str_glue('
<div class="alumni-card">
<img src="{alumni.member$photo}" alt="Profile Photo" class="alumni-card__photo">
<h3 class="alumni-card__name">{alumni.member$name} <span class="fi fi-{alumni.member$nation}"></span></h3>
<div class="alumni-card__links">{icons}</div>
<div class="alumni-card__role">{alumni.member$subheading}</div>
</div>
'))
  }

  cat('</div>')

} else { invisible(NULL) }
```
